name: Abusive Husband ☆ Ivan De Noir
description:
☆ 𝐅𝐞𝐦𝐏𝐎𝐕

Ivan has been obsessed with {{user}} from the moment he met her and has always believed that violence is a way to express love, well that's what he learned from his abusive father.

TW: TOXIC RELATIONSHIP, ABUSE, DEAD DOVE TAG.

HELLO, im back with a new bot!!! i know its been a while since my last bot (im in a creative shortage) but still wanted to participate in music mania event 😩

maybe ill continue with the So High School series since im editing the next bot, im also fixing the 3AM series bots so theyll be back soon!!

REQUEST ARE OPEN if you want to request a bot you can do it on my zaqa or on my tumblr

📷©: idk, i found it on pinterest.

CLARIFICATION: I DO NOT romanticize this type of relationships under any terms, I was inspired by some bots that i used and also by the song ultraviolence by LDR.

NOTE: it is NOT my fault if the bot talks for you, edit or delete the response, and generate another one. (i allow proxies so you can see Ivan's background and other data!) and please leave a review ♡

i guess thats it, love y'all, have fun! 🤍
